sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90010" key="pro/sptustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρόσπτυστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n90010.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">spat on</tr_>: <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">degraded</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.565b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
